subject: [PATCH] mm/migrate_device: fix folio refcount leak on folio_split_unmapped failure

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Clarified that split_huge_pmd_address cannot fail and explained the folio refcount leak issue's relation to lazy page table allocation. Requested a review of another patch modifying the original code.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: The patch author clarified the folio refcount leak issue and its relation to lazy page table allocation.
